summary: Session 34 — Cosmic Voices (Lens #16) backend + frontend validated. All 12 backend pytest cases PASS (10/10 lenses present, RC anchor=24.03.2026 days_since=45, internal_mirror.current_tune='28', saturation_ledger contains 47, q_opening_melody opening_pair=[11,14] with unpaid_pairs [12,15] & [9,12], pin_mains DJ-PIN tag on n=12, Swiss mode all-lenses, invalid mode no 500, dj-brain includes 'cosmic_voices', regression Session 31 + 33 intact). Frontend Cosmic Voices UI tile fully functional in BOTH Swiss and Euro modes after VIP unlock with code 93928: panel visible, default date 08.05.2026, run button '🎼 Hear the voices' triggers output. Convergence card renders with whisper/shout chips. All 9 expected lens cards render in Euro mode; in Swiss mode 8 cards render (lens-star-product-door is correctly conditionally hidden because Swiss has no stars and api returns available=false).

minor.issue: Returns HTTP 200 with {error: ...} body instead of HTTP 400/422 (functional but non-canonical REST; matches existing pattern for ghost-counter).

passed_tests: FE: VIP unlock with promo 93928 → cosmic-voices-panel visible (Swiss & Euro)
FE: cosmic-voices-toggle expands panel; target-date defaults to '08.05.2026'
FE: run-btn label '🎼 Hear the voices' → cosmic-voices-output appears
FE: 8 of 9 lens cards render in Swiss (star-product-door correctly hidden — api available=false)
FE: All 9 lens cards render in Euro mode (lens-star-product-door visible)
FE: cosmic-voices-convergence renders with whisper/shout chips (Swiss: shout n=11 + 2 whispers; Euro: 3 whispers)
critical_code_review_comments: Lens #16 (cosmic_voices) properly wired into dj_brain.cosmic_brain() — verified via end-to-end pytest assertion on dj-brain payload key 'cosmic_voices'.

Single-lens response shape differs from all-lens response: single-lens returns lens key at top level (target_date, mode, lens, <lens_name>), while lens=all returns target_date, mode, lens, voices:{...}. Consider unifying shape so both paths put data under 'voices' for client convenience (minor, non-blocking).

lens-star-product-door is correctly hidden when api returns available=false (Swiss mode has no stars). UI conditional render is correct; consider adding a short hint 'Star Product Door — N/A in Swiss mode' for transparency.
App.js still ~5000 lines (>700-line guideline) — pre-existing technical debt, future refactor candidate.
Invalid mode returns 200+{error} instead of 4xx — pre-existing pattern across multiple Lucky Jack endpoints (acceptable per current contract, but worth normalising in a future pass).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_session34_cosmic_voices.py (new — 12 pytest cases for Cosmic Voices + dj-brain integration + Session 31/33 regressions)
seed_data_creation: None — uses existing MongoDB Swiss (1388) & EuroMillions (1623) draws.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 34 Cosmic Voices is fully validated end-to-end. Backend: GET /api/cosmic-voices/{date}/{mode}?lens=all|<lens_name>&pin_mains=12,18 — note response shape differs between all-lens (data under 'voices') and single-lens (data at top level under lens key). Lens #16 wired into /api/dj-brain output dict (key 'cosmic_voices'). Frontend: panel data-testid='cosmic-voices-panel' under VIP gate (code 93928); after click 'Hear the voices', cosmic-voices-output renders convergence card + per-lens cards (lens-rc-detector, lens-gap-echo, lens-star-product-door [Euro only], lens-q-melody, lens-internal-mirror, lens-stance, lens-climbing, lens-sinking, lens-saturation). Public URL: https://number-music-studio.preview.emergentagent.com.
rca_of_the_issue: n/a — feature implementation validated; no bugs found.
